channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live Updates: Trump says Iran "completely agreed" to nuclear inspections, but Tehran denies any such plans - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: Trump says Iran "completely agreed" to nuclear inspections, but Tehran denies any such plans  CBS News
  2. Trump keeps claiming Iran made concessions. Iran keeps denying them  CNN
  3. Middle East crisis: Rubio and Vance hold call with Lebanon’s president; Trump claims Iran has agreed to nuclear inspections ‘long into future’ – as it happened  The Guardian
  4. Iran War Live Updates: Trump and Tehran Offer Conflicting Accounts of Nuclear Discussions  The New York Times
  5. Trump: Iran is ‘wrong’ to claim it didn’t agree to allow access to nuclear inspectors  The Times of Israel
